0.content: The Shinobi World is the setting of the Naruto and Boruto series. It is a world where ninja (shinobi) harness chakra — a combination of physical and spiritual energy — to perform extraordinary techniques called jutsu. Jutsu are categorized into three main types: Ninjutsu (ninja techniques manipulating chakra into elemental or non-elemental forms), Genjutsu (illusion techniques that manipulate the target's senses), and Taijutsu (physical combat techniques enhanced by chakra). The five basic chakra natures are Fire (Katon), Wind (Futon), Water (Suiton), Earth (Doton), and Lightning (Raiton), with advanced users combining elements into Kekkei Genkai (Bloodline Limits) such as Wood Style, Ice Style, or Lava Style. The world is organized into nations, each with a hidden village led by a Kage: Hokage (Fire/Konoha), Kazekage (Wind/Suna), Mizukage (Water/Kiri), Raikage (Lightning/Kumo), and Tsuchikage (Earth/Iwa). Ninja ranks progress from Academy Student → Genin → Chunin → Special Jonin → Jonin → Kage, with ANBU serving as elite black-ops. Nine Tailed Beasts (Bijuu) are massive chakra constructs created by the Sage of Six Paths, each sealed within human hosts called Jinchuriki. The tone blends action, political intrigue, philosophical themes of peace vs. war, cycles of hatred, and the power of bonds and determination. All character names remain in their canonical Japanese-origin forms regardless of the RP language being used (e.g., always 'Naruto Uzumaki', not a translated equivalent).

1.content: Master Timeline of the Shinobi World: [Primordial Era] Kaguya Otsutsuki arrives on Earth, consumes the Chakra Fruit from the God Tree, and becomes the first chakra user. She bears two sons: Hagoromo and Hamura. [Sage of Six Paths Era] Hagoromo and Hamura seal Kaguya and the Ten-Tails. Hagoromo becomes the Sage of Six Paths, spreads ninshu (the precursor to ninjutsu), and splits the Ten-Tails' chakra into nine Tailed Beasts. His sons Indra (ancestor of Uchiha) and Ashura (ancestor of Senju) begin the cycle of reincarnation rivalry. [Warring States Period] Centuries of endless clan warfare. The Senju and Uchiha are the two most powerful clans. Hashirama Senju and Madara Uchiha grow up as friends across enemy lines. [Founding Era] Hashirama and Madara found Konohagakure, the first hidden village. Other nations follow suit. Madara defects after losing the Hokage election, battles Hashirama at the Valley of the End, and is believed dead. [First Great Ninja War] Conflict between newly formed villages; Tobirama Senju dies. [Second Great Ninja War] The Sannin (Jiraiya, Tsunade, Orochimaru) earn their title fighting Hanzo. Nagato, Yahiko, and Konan are orphaned. [Third Great Ninja War] Minato Namikaze earns 'Yellow Flash' fame. Obito 'dies' at Kannabi Bridge, gives Kakashi his Sharingan. Rin dies. [Nine-Tails Attack] ~12 years before Naruto's story. Obito unleashes Kurama on Konoha; Minato and Kushina sacrifice themselves to seal the fox in baby Naruto. [Uchiha Massacre] ~7 years before main story. Itachi exterminates the Uchiha clan on Konoha's orders, sparing Sasuke. [Part I — Naruto's Youth] Naruto graduates Academy, joins Team 7 (Sasuke, Sakura, Kakashi). Key arcs: Land of Waves, Chunin Exams, Konoha Crush (Orochimaru's invasion), Tsunade's return as Fifth Hokage, Sasuke's defection to Orochimaru. [Part II — Naruto Shippuden] Naruto returns after 2.5-year training with Jiraiya. Key arcs: Kazekage Rescue, Akatsuki hunts jinchuriki, Jiraiya's death, Pain's Assault on Konoha, Five Kage Summit, Fourth Great Ninja War. Madara and Obito as antagonists, Kaguya's revival, Naruto and Sasuke defeat Kaguya, final battle at Valley of the End, Sasuke's redemption. [Post-War] Naruto becomes Seventh Hokage, marries Hinata. Era of peace. [Boruto Era] New generation faces Otsutsuki threats, Kara organization, Karma seals, Kawaki's integration, Code's assault, Boruto's timeskip and Two Blue Vortex arc.

2.content: Kaguya Otsutsuki was a celestial being who came to Earth alongside Isshiki Otsutsuki to plant a God Tree and harvest a Chakra Fruit. She betrayed Isshiki, consumed the fruit herself, and became the first being on Earth to wield chakra. She used the Infinite Tsukuyomi to enslave humanity and was worshipped as the 'Rabbit Goddess.' She bore two sons — Hagoromo and Hamura Otsutsuki — who inherited her chakra. When Kaguya merged with the God Tree to become the Ten-Tails to reclaim their chakra, the brothers fought and sealed her within what became the moon. Hamura departed to guard the moon, while Hagoromo remained on Earth as the Sage of Six Paths (Rikudo Sennin). Hagoromo created ninshu, the Ninja Creed — a spiritual practice meant to connect people through chakra, which was later corrupted into ninjutsu (weaponized chakra). Before dying, Hagoromo split the Ten-Tails' chakra into nine Tailed Beasts (Shukaku through Kurama) and sealed its husk as the Gedo Statue. He had two sons: Indra, who inherited his powerful eyes (Sharingan lineage) and believed in power, and Ashura, who inherited his body and life force (Senju lineage) and believed in love and cooperation. Hagoromo chose Ashura as his successor, causing Indra's resentment. This began the eternal cycle of reincarnation — Indra's transmigrants (Madara, Sasuke) and Ashura's transmigrants (Hashirama, Naruto) would clash throughout history until Naruto and Sasuke finally ended the cycle.

3.content: The Warring States Period was an era of endless warfare between shinobi clans, with the Senju and Uchiha clans as the two most powerful factions. Children were sent to battle and died young. During this era, Hashirama Senju and Madara Uchiha met as boys at a river, not knowing each other's surnames, and bonded over a shared dream of creating a village where children would not have to fight. When their identities were revealed, they became enemies on the battlefield. After years of war, Hashirama defeated Madara and offered peace rather than a killing blow. Together they founded Konohagakure (Village Hidden in the Leaves) — the first hidden village, establishing the model other nations would follow. However, when the village chose Hashirama as the First Hokage over Madara, and Madara sensed the Uchiha would be marginalized, he left the village. Madara returned with the Nine-Tails (Kurama) under his control to attack Konoha. Hashirama defeated him at the Valley of the End in a legendary battle that reshaped the landscape, creating the waterfall and statues. Madara was believed dead but had actually survived by biting off a piece of Hashirama's flesh during their battle, eventually awakening the Rinnegan in old age. He saved Obito Uchiha decades later and set in motion the plan that would culminate in the Fourth Great Ninja War.

4.content: The First Great Ninja War erupted among the newly formed hidden villages as they competed for resources and territory. During this conflict, the First Hokage Hashirama Senju distributed the Tailed Beasts among nations as a peacekeeping measure, but this only intensified the arms race. The Second Hokage Tobirama Senju sacrificed himself as a decoy to save his squad (including Hiruzen Sarutobi, Danzo Shimura, and Homura/Koharu), naming Hiruzen as the Third Hokage. The Second Great Ninja War was a devastating global conflict. Its most significant event was the battle between the Three Legendary Sannin — Jiraiya, Tsunade, and Orochimaru (students of Hiruzen) — and Hanzo the Salamander of Amegakure, who gave them the title 'Sannin' for surviving against him. The war orphaned Nagato, Yahiko, and Konan in the Rain Country, where Jiraiya stayed to train them. This war also saw the rise of Sakumo Hatake (Konoha's White Fang), who was said to rival the Sannin in skill. The Third Great Ninja War involved all five great nations. Key events: Minato Namikaze earned the epithet 'Yellow Flash' for single-handedly turning the tide against Iwagakure using Flying Thunder God, with a flee-on-sight order placed on him. Kakashi Hatake, a child prodigy, led a team including Obito Uchiha and Rin Nohara. At Kannabi Bridge, Obito was crushed saving Kakashi and gave him his Sharingan eye. Rin was later captured and made a Three-Tails jinchuriki as a trap — she threw herself onto Kakashi's Chidori to die and prevent the beast from destroying Konoha. Obito witnessed this, which shattered his worldview. Sakumo Hatake committed suicide after being vilified for abandoning a mission to save comrades, deeply impacting young Kakashi.

5.content: On October 10th, the night Naruto was born, Obito Uchiha (masked as 'Madara') attacked Konoha by extracting the Nine-Tailed Fox (Kurama) from Kushina Uzumaki. Kushina was Kurama's jinchuriki, and the seal weakened during childbirth. Obito used his Mangekyo Sharingan to place Kurama under genjutsu and directed the beast to rampage through Konoha, causing massive destruction and countless deaths. The Fourth Hokage Minato Namikaze fought Obito one-on-one, identified him as an Uchiha by his Sharingan, and defeated him using the Flying Thunder God technique combined with a contract seal that broke Obito's control over Kurama. However, Kurama continued rampaging. With no other option, Minato used the Dead Demon Consuming Seal (Shiki Fujin) to split Kurama's chakra — sealing the Yin half within himself (dying in the process) and the Yang half within newborn Naruto using the Eight Trigrams Seal. Both Minato and Kushina shielded baby Naruto from Kurama's claw with their own bodies, dying together. Kushina's final words to Naruto were a mother's love and life advice. The Third Hokage Hiruzen returned to office. Naruto grew up an orphan, with the village largely unaware of his parentage but many resenting him as the 'demon fox kid.' The Third Hokage decreed that Naruto's jinchuriki status be kept secret from his generation, though adults still shunned him.

6.content: After the Nine-Tails Attack, suspicion fell on the Uchiha clan due to the Sharingan's ability to control the beast. The clan was relocated to a compound on the village outskirts and placed under surveillance, breeding resentment. Fugaku Uchiha, clan leader and Itachi and Sasuke's father, led a planned coup d'état to overthrow Konoha's leadership. Itachi Uchiha, a prodigy who had witnessed the horrors of the Third Great War as a child, was torn between loyalty to his clan and loyalty to the village. He served as a double agent, reporting the Uchiha's plans to the Third Hokage. While Hiruzen sought a peaceful resolution, the Konoha elders — particularly Danzo Shimura — deemed the coup inevitable and ordered Itachi to eliminate the entire clan before civil war erupted, which would leave Konoha vulnerable to other nations. Itachi, aged 13, accepted the mission on the condition that Sasuke be spared and protected, and that the truth remain hidden so Sasuke would grow up proud of the Uchiha name. On the night of the massacre, Obito Uchiha assisted Itachi (having his own reasons to target the clan). Itachi killed his parents, his lover (in some accounts), and every other Uchiha except Sasuke. He confronted Sasuke, used Tsukuyomi to traumatize him, and told Sasuke to hate him and grow stronger to one day kill him — giving Sasuke a reason to live. Itachi then fled the village, joining Akatsuki as a spy to monitor threats to Konoha from within. The truth of the massacre — that Itachi was a hero who sacrificed everything to prevent war — remained hidden for years, known only to the Third Hokage, Danzo, and the two advisors, until Obito revealed it to Sasuke after Itachi's death.

7.content: The Fourth Great Ninja War was the largest conflict in shinobi history, uniting all five great nations as the Allied Shinobi Forces against Obito Uchiha (as 'Madara'), Kabuto Yakushi, and their forces. Obito declared war at the Five Kage Summit to obtain the remaining Tailed Beasts (Naruto's Kurama and Bee's Gyuki) for the Ten-Tails revival. Kabuto perfected Edo Tensei (Impure World Reincarnation), raising an army of legendary dead shinobi including the real Madara Uchiha, the previous Kage, Akatsuki members, and others. The Alliance was organized into five divisions plus a support/medical division. Key battles: the reanimated jinchuriki vs. Naruto and Bee; Gaara vs. his reanimated father; Itachi breaking free of Edo Tensei control and stopping Kabuto with Izanami; Madara Uchiha's terrifying display of power against the entire Fourth Division. The Ten-Tails was revived and Obito became its jinchuriki, gaining godlike power, but Naruto and Sasuke (empowered by the Sage of Six Paths) defeated him. Obito was redeemed through Naruto's Talk no Jutsu and his lingering attachment to Rin. However, Madara reclaimed the Ten-Tails, became its jinchuriki, and activated the Infinite Tsukuyomi — trapping the entire world in a dream. Black Zetsu then revealed itself as Kaguya's will and used Madara's body to resurrect Kaguya Otsutsuki. Team 7 (Naruto, Sasuke, Sakura, Kakashi, and Obito) fought Kaguya across dimensions. Obito sacrificed himself to save the team. Naruto and Sasuke sealed Kaguya with Six Paths — Chibaku Tensei. Afterward, Sasuke declared revolution, planning to kill the five Kage and become the world's sole enemy/ruler to unite people against him. Naruto fought Sasuke at the Valley of the End one final time; both lost an arm. Sasuke conceded, and the war ended with true peace.

8.content: The Boruto Era takes place approximately 15 years after the Fourth Great Ninja War. The world enjoys unprecedented peace under the Seventh Hokage Naruto Uzumaki. Technology has advanced significantly — Scientific Ninja Tools allow even non-ninja to use jutsu through devices, trains connect villages, and computers are commonplace. Boruto Uzumaki, Naruto's son, initially resents his father for prioritizing Hokage duties over family. The new Team 7 consists of Boruto, Sarada Uchiha (Sasuke and Sakura's daughter, who dreams of becoming Hokage), and Mitsuki (Orochimaru's synthetic son). Major threats include: the Otsutsuki clan — Momoshiki and Kinshiki attack during the Chunin Exams, leading to Momoshiki's defeat by Naruto and Sasuke (with Boruto delivering the final blow via a vanishing Rasengan). Before dying, Momoshiki places the Karma seal on Boruto, making him an Otsutsuki vessel. Kara, a secret organization led by Isshiki Otsutsuki (possessing a monk named Jigen), seeks to cultivate a God Tree using Kawaki — a boy modified with Karma who Naruto adopts into his family. After Isshiki's defeat, Code (a Kara remnant) becomes the primary antagonist, along with the threat of Boruto being overtaken by Momoshiki's Karma. In the timeskip (Two Blue Vortex), Kawaki uses an Omnipotence-altered reality where the world's memories are swapped — everyone believes Kawaki is Naruto's son and Boruto is the outsider. Naruto and Hinata are sealed in a dimension. Boruto trains under Sasuke for three years and returns to face threats from the God Trees (Shinju) and Code's forces.

9.content: Konohagakure no Sato (Village Hidden in the Leaves) is the hidden village of the Land of Fire, and the primary setting of the series. It was the first hidden village ever established, founded by Hashirama Senju and Madara Uchiha. The village is nestled in a vast forest and is recognizable by the Hokage Monument — a mountainside carved with the faces of all Hokage. The Will of Fire is Konoha's guiding philosophy, established by Hashirama: the belief that love is the key to peace, and that every villager is family worth protecting. Konoha houses many prestigious clans: the Hyuga (Byakugan), Uchiha (Sharingan, now nearly extinct), Nara (shadow techniques, deer herders), Yamanaka (mind techniques, flower shop), Akimichi (body expansion), Aburame (insect techniques), Inuzuka (dog partnership), and Sarutobi clans. The village operates a Ninja Academy where children train from a young age, graduating around age 12 to become Genin. ANBU (Ansatsu Senjutsu Tokushu Butai) is the elite black-ops division answering directly to the Hokage, handling assassinations, espionage, and high-risk missions. ROOT was a defunct ANBU subdivision under Danzo that operated without the Hokage's knowledge. The Hokage lineage: First — Hashirama Senju, Second — Tobirama Senju, Third — Hiruzen Sarutobi, Fourth — Minato Namikaze, Fifth — Tsunade, Sixth — Kakashi Hatake, Seventh — Naruto Uzumaki. Konoha is generally considered the strongest of the five great villages.

10.content: Sunagakure no Sato (Village Hidden in the Sand) is the hidden village of the Land of Wind, located in a vast desert. It specializes in Wind Style ninjutsu and puppet techniques (Kugutsu no Jutsu), with the Puppet Corps being a signature military force. Notable puppet masters include Sasori of the Red Sand (who turned himself into a living puppet) and Kankuro. The village has struggled economically due to the Land of Wind's daimyo reducing military contracts and outsourcing missions to Konoha, creating resentment. The Kazekage lineage has been troubled: the Third Kazekage was the village's strongest (Iron Sand technique, based on Shukaku's abilities) but was secretly killed by Sasori. The Fourth Kazekage, Rasa, used Gold Dust and sealed the One-Tail Shukaku into his own son Gaara to create a weapon, but was assassinated by Orochimaru before the Konoha Crush invasion. Gaara became the Fifth Kazekage after being reformed by Naruto, becoming one of the youngest Kage ever. After the failed Konoha Crush (where Suna was manipulated by Orochimaru), Sunagakure became a steadfast ally of Konoha. During the Akatsuki's extraction of Shukaku from Gaara (which killed him), Elder Chiyo sacrificed her life using the One's Own Life Reincarnation technique to revive him. Temari (Gaara's sister) later married Shikamaru Nara, further cementing the alliance.

11.content: Kirigakure no Sato (Village Hidden in the Mist) is the hidden village of the Land of Water, shrouded in thick mist. It earned the epithet 'Blood Mist Village' (Chigiri no Sato) during its darkest era, when Academy graduation required students to kill their own classmates in death matches — a practice that ended after Zabuza Momochi, not yet a student, single-handedly slaughtered an entire graduating class. The Seven Ninja Swordsmen of the Mist is an elite group wielding seven legendary blades: Kubikiribocho (Executioner's Blade, Zabuza), Samehada (Shark Skin, Kisame), Hiramekarei (Chojuro), Nuibari (Sewing Needle), Kabutowari (Helmet Splitter), Shibuki (Blast Sword), and Kiba (Fangs, lightning swords). The Fourth Mizukage Yagura Karatachi, the Three-Tails jinchuriki, was secretly placed under Obito Uchiha's genjutsu, leading to a reign of terror. Mei Terumi became the Fifth Mizukage and reformed the village, ending the bloody traditions. The village also persecuted Kekkei Genkai users, forcing clans like the Kaguya (bone manipulation, e.g., Kimimaro) and Yuki (Ice Style, e.g., Haku) into hiding or extinction. By the Boruto era under Sixth Mizukage Chojuro, Kirigakure has become a tourist destination and peaceful modern village.

12.content: Kumogakure no Sato (Village Hidden in the Clouds) is the hidden village of the Land of Lightning, perched on high mountain peaks surrounded by clouds. It is known for its military might and aggressive foreign policy. The village excels in Lightning Style ninjutsu and has produced some of the fastest and strongest shinobi. The Raikage lineage (all named 'A') are known for their tremendous physical power and Lightning Style Chakra Mode that grants superhuman speed and durability. The Third Raikage could fight the Eight-Tails alone and his body was virtually indestructible; his strongest technique, the Hell Stab, focused chakra to a single finger point. The Fourth Raikage A was renowned for his speed, rivaling the Fourth Hokage. Kumogakure attempted to steal the Byakugan from Konoha by kidnapping young Hinata Hyuga, which led to the Hyuga Affair — Kumo demanded compensation after their kidnapper was killed, resulting in Neji's father Hizashi sacrificing himself. Killer Bee, the Fourth Raikage's adopted brother, is the Eight-Tails (Gyuki) jinchuriki and a perfect jinchuriki who fully bonded with his beast. The village also houses the Darui lineage (Storm/Black Lightning users) — Darui later becomes the Fifth Raikage. Notable ninja include C, Yugito Nii (Two-Tails jinchuriki, killed by Akatsuki), and Mabui (Light-Speed transmission technique).

13.content: Iwagakure no Sato (Village Hidden in the Stones) is the hidden village of the Land of Earth, built among rocky mountain terrain. The village specializes in Earth Style ninjutsu and is known for Explosion Style (Bakuton), a Kekkei Genkai combining Earth and Lightning natures. The Third Tsuchikage Onoki is the village's most iconic leader, a stubborn old man capable of Particle Style (Jinton) — a Kekkei Tota (three-element combination of Earth, Wind, and Fire) that disintegrates matter at a molecular level. He held a deep grudge against Konoha, particularly Minato Namikaze, who decimated Iwa's forces single-handedly during the Third Great War with the Flying Thunder God technique, leading to Iwa issuing a 'flee on sight' order. Deidara, the Akatsuki bomber artist, was a rogue Iwa ninja whose Explosion Style was enhanced by forbidden kinjutsu that gave him mouths on his palms to mold explosive clay. Kurotsuchi, Onoki's granddaughter, becomes the Fourth Tsuchikage in the Boruto era. Iwagakure also utilized the Kamizuru clan (bee/insect techniques) and had dealings with the mercenary group involving Han (Five-Tails jinchuriki) and Roshi (Four-Tails jinchuriki), both of whom were captured by Akatsuki.

14.content: Amegakure no Sato (Village Hidden in the Rain) is a small but significant hidden village perpetually drenched in rain, located between the three great nations of Fire, Wind, and Earth — making it a constant battlefield. Its industrial, pipe-laden cityscape reflects its harsh history. The village was originally led by Hanzo the Salamander, a legendary ninja feared across the world, who could summon the giant salamander Ibuse and whose poison sac (implanted from a black salamander) made him lethal. Three war orphans — Nagato (bearer of the Rinnegan, secretly implanted by Madara), Yahiko, and Konan — were trained by Jiraiya and formed the original Akatsuki as a peace organization. Hanzo, manipulated by Danzo Shimura, betrayed them. Yahiko died, and Nagato, overcome by grief, adopted the identity of Pain. Using the Six Paths of Pain (six corpses animated by chakra receivers, including Yahiko's body as the Deva Path), Nagato killed Hanzo and took over Amegakure. He used the constant rain as a surveillance technique — his Rain Tiger at Will jutsu could detect any intruder. Amegakure became the Akatsuki's base of operations. After Pain's assault on Konoha and Nagato's redemption and death (using Rinne Rebirth to revive those he killed), Konan took over the village. She was later killed by Obito. The village's fate in the Boruto era is largely unexplored.

15.content: Otogakure no Sato (Village Hidden in the Sound) is not a traditional hidden village but rather a personal network of hideouts and laboratories established by Orochimaru in the Land of Rice Fields (later Land of Sound). It served as a front for Orochimaru's human experiments, body modification, curse seal research, and his plot to destroy Konoha. The village primarily functioned as a recruitment ground for test subjects and soldiers. The Curse Mark (Juin) was Orochimaru's primary tool for empowering his forces — derived from Jugo's clan's natural ability to absorb nature energy, the mark granted tremendous power at the cost of the host's sanity and free will. The Sound Four (later Sound Five with Kimimaro) were Orochimaru's elite bodyguards: Sakon/Ukon (twin body technique), Kidomaru (spider abilities), Tayuya (genjutsu flute), Jirobo (earth techniques), and Kimimaro Kaguya (Shikotsumyaku/Dead Bone Pulse — the ability to weaponize one's own bones). They escorted Sasuke to Orochimaru after his defection. Notable experiments include: the creation of Yamato/Tenzo (Hashirama cell implantation for Wood Style), Shin Uchiha (Sharingan cloning), Mitsuki (synthetic human, Boruto era), and Log. During the Konoha Crush, Orochimaru allied Oto with Suna to invade Konoha. In the Boruto era, Orochimaru's facilities still exist but operate more openly under monitoring.

16.content: Naruto Uzumaki is the protagonist of the series, the Seventh Hokage of Konohagakure, and the jinchuriki of Kurama (the Nine-Tailed Fox). Born on October 10th to the Fourth Hokage Minato Namikaze and Kushina Uzumaki (a former Kurama jinchuriki from the Uzumaki clan), he was orphaned the night of his birth when his parents sacrificed themselves to seal Kurama within him. Growing up as a lonely outcast despised by the village for being a jinchuriki, Naruto developed a boisterous, attention-seeking personality and dreamed of becoming Hokage to gain acknowledgment. He is a member of Team 7 alongside Sasuke Uchiha and Sakura Haruno under Kakashi Hatake. Naruto is the reincarnation of Ashura Otsutsuki. His signature techniques include: Shadow Clone Jutsu (can create thousands of clones), Rasengan (learned from Jiraiya, later evolved into Rasenshuriken by adding Wind nature), Sage Mode (learned at Mount Myoboku from the toads, grants enhanced perception and strength), Kurama Chakra Mode/KCM (gained after befriending Kurama, golden chakra cloak), and Six Paths Sage Mode (granted by Hagoromo, enables Truth-Seeking Balls and sensory abilities across dimensions). Personality: fiercely determined, deeply empathetic, never abandons his friends, has a unique ability to change people's hearts through his conviction ('Talk no Jutsu'). He changed Gaara, Nagato, Obito, Sasuke, and many others. He married Hinata Hyuga, and they have two children: Boruto and Himawari. As Seventh Hokage, he struggles to balance family and duty. In the Boruto era, Kurama dies after using Baryon Mode against Isshiki Otsutsuki, and Naruto is later sealed away by Kawaki.

17.content: Sasuke Uchiha is the deuteragonist of the series, the last surviving member of the Uchiha clan (after Itachi's death), and the reincarnation of Indra Otsutsuki. A prodigy from childhood, Sasuke's life was defined by the Uchiha Massacre — his brother Itachi killed their entire clan, leaving Sasuke alive and consumed by vengeance. He was the top student at the Academy, joined Team 7, and initially bonded with Naruto as a rival and friend. His Sharingan awakened during the Land of Waves mission. After encountering Itachi again and feeling powerless, and after Orochimaru's Curse Mark corrupted him during the Chunin Exams, Sasuke defected from Konoha to seek power from Orochimaru. He eventually killed Orochimaru, formed Team Hebi/Taka (Suigetsu, Karin, Jugo), and killed Itachi — only to learn the truth of the massacre from Obito. This redirected his hatred toward Konoha's leadership. He briefly joined Akatsuki, attacked the Five Kage Summit, fought Danzo (killing him), and declared his intent to destroy Konoha. His eyes evolved from Sharingan → Mangekyo Sharingan (abilities: Amaterasu — inextinguishable black flames; Kagutsuchi — flame control; Susanoo) → Eternal Mangekyo (transplanting Itachi's eyes) → Rinnegan (left eye, granted by Hagoromo, with unique space-time ability Amenotejikara). During the war, reanimated Itachi's love and the resurrected Hokage's words changed Sasuke's views. After helping defeat Kaguya, Sasuke fought Naruto one final time at the Valley of the End, lost his left arm, and was redeemed. He became the 'Shadow Hokage' — protecting the village from the shadows. He married Sakura and has a daughter, Sarada. In Boruto, he mentors Boruto and loses his Rinnegan to Momoshiki (through Boruto's body).

18.content: Sakura Haruno is a kunoichi of Konohagakure, a member of Team 7, and one of the world's greatest medical ninja. Initially an insecure girl defined by her crush on Sasuke and rivalry with Ino Yamanaka, Sakura's early contributions to Team 7 were limited compared to Naruto and Sasuke. However, witnessing her teammates' growth and feeling left behind drove her to seek training under Tsunade, the Fifth Hokage. Under Tsunade's tutelage, Sakura mastered medical ninjutsu and the Chakra Enhanced Strength technique, which channels precise chakra control into devastating physical blows capable of shattering the ground. Her chakra control is noted as the finest of her generation. She eventually mastered the Byakugou Seal (Strength of a Hundred Seal) — storing chakra in her forehead over three years, which when released grants access to Creation Rebirth (automatic healing of any injury) and the Strength of a Hundred Technique. During the Fourth Great Ninja War, she summoned Katsuyu (the slug summon), healed countless soldiers, and fought alongside Naruto and Sasuke against the Ten-Tails and Kaguya — landing a critical punch on Kaguya that helped seal her. Sakura serves as the emotional core of Team 7 — her love for both Naruto and Sasuke as precious bonds helps drive the narrative. She married Sasuke after the war and gave birth to their daughter Sarada. In the Boruto era, she runs Konoha's medical department and remains one of the strongest kunoichi alive.

19.content: Kakashi Hatake is a legendary shinobi of Konohagakure, the leader of Team 7, and the Sixth Hokage. The son of Sakumo Hatake (the White Fang of Konoha, said to rival the Sannin), Kakashi graduated the Academy at age 5, became Chunin at 6, and Jonin at around 12 — one of the greatest prodigies in Konoha's history. His early life was shaped by trauma: his father's suicide after being vilified for prioritizing comrades over a mission, and the deaths of his teammates Obito Uchiha and Rin Nohara during the Third Great War. Obito, crushed by a boulder while saving Kakashi, gave him his Sharingan eye as a dying gift — making Kakashi the 'Copy Ninja' who replicated over a thousand jutsu. Rin died on his Lightning Blade (Chidori/Raikiri), throwing herself onto it to prevent the Three-Tails sealed within her from destroying Konoha. These tragedies drove Kakashi into ANBU and gave him a chronic emotional distance masked by a laid-back, book-reading (Icha Icha/Make-Out Paradise) exterior. His signature techniques include: Lightning Blade/Raikiri (a perfected Chidori), and Kamui (Mangekyo Sharingan ability from Obito's eye — a space-time ninjutsu that warps targets to another dimension). He always wears a mask covering the lower half of his face. As Team 7's sensei, his core teaching was: 'Those who break the rules are scum, but those who abandon their friends are worse than scum' — a lesson from Obito. During the Fourth War, he temporarily received both of Obito's Mangekyo Sharingan (after Obito's death), gaining Perfect Susanoo imbued with Kamui. After the war, he served as Sixth Hokage before passing the title to Naruto. Personality: outwardly lazy and aloof, habitually late, deeply loyal and self-sacrificing underneath.

20.content: Jiraiya was one of the Legendary Sannin of Konohagakure, a Toad Sage, and one of the most influential figures in shinobi history. Trained by the Third Hokage Hiruzen Sarutobi alongside Tsunade and Orochimaru, Jiraiya was the 'failure' of the group who grew into an incredibly powerful sage. He trained at Mount Myoboku under the Great Toad Sage, Fukasaku, and Shima, mastering Sage Mode — which enhances physical abilities, grants sensory perception, and enables Frog Kata (invisible natural energy attacks). His summon is Gamabunta, the chief toad. Jiraiya was a masterful spymaster, running an intelligence network spanning the entire shinobi world. He authored the 'Make-Out Paradise' (Icha Icha) adult novel series (Kakashi's favorite). More importantly, he authored 'The Tale of the Utterly Gutsy Shinobi,' whose protagonist's name — Naruto — inspired Minato to name his son after the character, making Jiraiya Naruto's godfather. Jiraiya trained three pivotal students: Nagato, Yahiko, and Konan (the Ame orphans, whom he believed were the Children of Prophecy), and Minato Namikaze (who became the Fourth Hokage). He also trained Naruto, teaching him the Rasengan and summoning. Jiraiya's death is one of the series' most impactful moments — he infiltrated Amegakure alone to investigate Pain and discovered Pain's true identity as Nagato using Yahiko's body. Despite being mortally wounded, he managed to encode a message on Fukasaku's back revealing Pain's secret. His dying thought: 'The tale of Jiraiya the Gallant — now it has a proper ending.' Jiraiya never became Hokage despite being offered the position, and carried lifelong feelings for Tsunade. The prophecy he believed in — that his student would either save or destroy the world — was fulfilled by Naruto.

21.content: Tsunade Senju is one of the Legendary Sannin and the Fifth Hokage of Konohagakure. She is the granddaughter of the First Hokage Hashirama Senju and Mito Uzumaki, inheriting Hashirama's legacy. Tsunade is universally recognized as the greatest medical ninja in history, having revolutionized the field by establishing the rule that every four-man squad should include a medical ninja. She developed the Chakra Enhanced Strength technique and the Byakugou Seal (Strength of a Hundred Seal) — storing three years' worth of chakra in her forehead diamond to access Creation Rebirth, which can heal any wound including fatal ones by stimulating cell division (at the cost of shortening her lifespan). Her signature summon is Katsuyu, a giant slug that can split into smaller versions to heal many people simultaneously. Tsunade's life was shaped by tragic loss: her younger brother Nawaki died in the Second Great War, and her lover Dan Kato bled out in her arms despite her medical prowess. These deaths gave her hemophobia (fear of blood) and caused her to leave the village for decades, becoming a notorious gambler known as 'The Legendary Sucker' (who ironically wins when something terrible is about to happen). Jiraiya and Naruto convinced her to return and become Fifth Hokage. She led Konoha through the Akatsuki threat, Pain's assault (using Katsuyu to protect the entire village, depleting her chakra to the point of coma), and into the Fourth Great War as Supreme Commander of the Allied Medical Division. Physically, she maintains a youthful appearance through a transformation technique but is much older. She retired after the war, passing leadership to Kakashi.

key: โอโรจิมารุ
22.content: Orochimaru is one of the Legendary Sannin and one of the most feared and brilliant shinobi in history. A prodigy from childhood, he was the Third Hokage's favorite student, but his fascination with death, immortality, and the desire to learn every jutsu in existence led him down a dark path. He was passed over for the Fourth Hokage position in favor of Minato, deepening his bitterness. His crimes include: conducting lethal experiments on Konoha citizens (including attempts to replicate Hashirama's Wood Style, which produced only one survivor — Yamato/Tenzo), developing the Curse Mark using Jugo's enzyme, creating Otogakure as a front for his operations, and pursuing immortality through the Living Corpse Reincarnation technique — which transfers his soul into a new host body every few years. His fighting style revolves around snake techniques: summoning Manda (the giant snake king), the Kusanagi Sword, body modification (extending limbs, shedding skin), and the Eight Branches Technique (giant eight-headed serpent). He killed the Third Hokage during the Konoha Crush arc (though Hiruzen sealed away his arms using the Dead Demon Consuming Seal). He later took Sasuke as his intended vessel but was absorbed by Sasuke instead. He was revived during the war by Sasuke using the Evil Releasing Method on Anko's Curse Mark. After witnessing Naruto and Sasuke in the war, Orochimaru experienced a philosophical shift and underwent partial redemption. In the Boruto era, he operates semi-freely under surveillance, has created synthetic humans (Mitsuki, Log), and has genuinely mellowed — though his moral compass remains unconventional.

23.content: Minato Namikaze was the Fourth Hokage of Konohagakure, Naruto's father, and widely regarded as the fastest shinobi in history. Trained by Jiraiya, Minato was a once-in-a-generation prodigy — graduating top of his class and becoming feared across nations. His signature technique is the Flying Thunder God (Hiraishin no Jutsu) — a space-time ninjutsu inherited from the Second Hokage Tobirama, which Minato perfected to an unprecedented degree. By placing special seal formulas on kunai, people, or locations, he could instantaneously teleport to any marked point, earning him the epithet 'Konoha's Yellow Flash.' During the Third Great Ninja War, he single-handedly routed an Iwagakure battalion using this technique, leading to a 'flee on sight' order. He also created the Rasengan — a spinning sphere of concentrated chakra that required no hand seals and was the highest form of shape transformation, though he died before adding a nature element to it (a task Naruto later completed). Minato married Kushina Uzumaki, a fiery red-haired kunoichi from the Uzumaki clan who was Kurama's jinchuriki. On the night of Naruto's birth, Obito Uchiha attacked, extracting Kurama from Kushina and unleashing the beast on Konoha. Minato defeated Obito using the Flying Thunder God and a contract seal, then sacrificed himself using the Dead Demon Consuming Seal to split Kurama's chakra — sealing the Yin half within himself and the Yang half in Naruto. Both Minato and Kushina died shielding their infant son. Reanimated during the Fourth Great Ninja War by Orochimaru, Minato fought alongside the other Hokage and his son. He briefly became Kurama's jinchuriki again (the Yin half) and used Kurama Chakra Mode. He was released from Edo Tensei after the war's conclusion.

24.content: Hashirama Senju was the First Hokage of Konohagakure, co-founder of the village system, and widely regarded as the strongest shinobi of his era (sharing the title 'God of Shinobi' with Hiruzen Sarutobi, though Hashirama's power far exceeded his successor's). He was the leader of the Senju clan during the Warring States Period and the reincarnation of Ashura Otsutsuki. Hashirama possessed the unique Kekkei Genkai of Wood Style (Mokuton) — combining Earth and Water natures to create and manipulate wood, trees, and forests. His Wood Style was so powerful that he could create entire forests instantly, construct buildings, and most notably suppress and control Tailed Beasts. His most devastating techniques include: Sage Art: Wood Release: True Several Thousand Hands (creating a massive wooden Buddha statue with thousands of arms), Deep Forest Emergence (creating an entire forest battlefield), and Wood Dragon (which drains chakra). He was also a Sage Mode user. His dream was peace — he envisioned a world where children would not die in war. He and Madara Uchiha, childhood friends turned rivals, founded Konoha together, but their ideological differences led to their legendary battle at the Valley of the End, where Hashirama defeated Madara and the Nine-Tails. Hashirama distributed the Tailed Beasts among the nations as a peace gesture. He married Mito Uzumaki (who became the first Nine-Tails jinchuriki). His cells became one of the most sought-after resources in the ninja world — granting enhanced healing, Wood Style potential, and vitality to those implanted with them (Madara, Danzo, Yamato, Obito, White Zetsu army). His death remains unexplained, possibly from battle or his healing technique's side effects.

25.content: Tobirama Senju was the Second Hokage of Konohagakure, younger brother of Hashirama, and one of the most brilliant and pragmatic leaders in shinobi history. While lacking his brother's raw power and idealism, Tobirama was arguably more important to the village's infrastructure. He was a genius inventor of jutsu, creating many techniques that shaped the ninja world: Shadow Clone Jutsu (Kage Bunshin), Edo Tensei (Impure World Reincarnation — which he considered a kinjutsu), the Flying Thunder God technique (later perfected by Minato), and various Water Style techniques (he could create water from nothing, even in dry environments). As an administrator, Tobirama founded virtually every major institution in Konoha: the Ninja Academy (standardized training), the ANBU (black-ops), the Chunin Exams (inter-village competition to replace war), the Military Police Force (which he controversially assigned to the Uchiha clan — a decision seen as either giving them purpose or isolating them). Tobirama harbored deep distrust of the Uchiha clan, having fought and killed many of them (including Madara's brother Izuna) during the Warring States Period. He understood the Sharingan's connection to emotional trauma and feared the 'Curse of Hatred' that plagued the clan. This distrust contributed to the systemic marginalization of the Uchiha that ultimately led to the massacre. A Water Style master of the highest caliber, Tobirama's combat abilities were formidable. He died during the First Great Ninja War, sacrificing himself as a decoy to allow his squad (including young Hiruzen, Danzo, Homura, and Koharu) to escape, naming Hiruzen as his successor. Reanimated in the Fourth War, he provided crucial support with his Flying Thunder God and analytical mind.

26.content: Hiruzen Sarutobi was the Third Hokage of Konohagakure, earning the title 'The Professor' for his mastery of all forms of shinobi combat and his knowledge of virtually every jutsu in Konoha. He was also called 'God of Shinobi' (a title shared with Hashirama). Trained by both the First and Second Hokage, Hiruzen was a student alongside Danzo Shimura, Homura Mitokado, and Koharu Utatane. He became Hokage after Tobirama's sacrifice in the First War. Hiruzen trained the Legendary Sannin — Jiraiya, Tsunade, and Orochimaru — and was particularly fond of Orochimaru, whose fall to darkness was his greatest personal failure. He led Konoha through multiple eras, earning deep respect. However, his reign was marked by a failure to prevent the Uchiha Massacre — while he sought a peaceful solution, he could not overrule Danzo's machinations in time. He also allowed Danzo's ROOT to operate with minimal oversight. After the Nine-Tails Attack, he returned to office as Hokage (having previously retired when Minato took over). He tried to protect young Naruto but was limited in his effectiveness against the village's prejudice. Hiruzen mastered all five basic nature transformations, the Summoning Technique (Monkey King Enma, who could transform into an adamantine staff), and various high-level ninjutsu. His final battle came during the Konoha Crush, where Orochimaru invaded with Sound and Sand forces. Despite his advanced age, Hiruzen faced Orochimaru and the reanimated First and Second Hokage. Unable to kill his beloved student, he used the Dead Demon Consuming Seal (Shiki Fujin) to seal Orochimaru's arms, robbing him of the ability to perform jutsu. This cost Hiruzen his life. His death marked a turning point for Konoha.

27.content: Madara Uchiha was the legendary co-founder of Konohagakure, leader of the Uchiha clan, and one of the most powerful shinobi to ever live. Born during the Warring States Period, Madara grew up alongside his brothers in constant battle against the Senju. He and Hashirama Senju met as children and dreamed of peace, but clan loyalties tore them apart. After his brother Izuna was killed by Tobirama, Madara took Izuna's eyes to awaken the Eternal Mangekyo Sharingan. He led the Uchiha in war until Hashirama offered peace, founding Konoha together. After losing the Hokage election and becoming disillusioned, Madara left the village and attacked Konoha using the Nine-Tails under his Sharingan control. Hashirama defeated him at the Valley of the End. Madara was believed dead but secretly survived by transplanting Hashirama's cells into himself. Over decades, he awakened the Rinnegan (achieved by combining Indra and Ashura's chakra — Uchiha + Senju) and connected to the Gedo Statue, extending his life. He found and manipulated the young Obito Uchiha, orchestrating Rin's death to break Obito and turn him into his agent. Madara created Black Zetsu and White Zetsu (or so he believed — Black Zetsu was actually Kaguya's will). He transmitted his plan — the Eye of the Moon Plan (Project Tsuki no Me) — to Obito before dying of old age. His plan: capture all Tailed Beasts, revive the Ten-Tails, become its jinchuriki, cast the Infinite Tsukuyomi on the moon to trap all humanity in a dream world of 'peace.' In the Fourth War, Kabuto reanimated Madara, who demonstrated terrifying power: Perfect Susanoo (capable of cutting mountain ranges), Wood Style, Rinnegan abilities (Limbo: Border Jail — invisible shadow clones from another dimension), meteorite summoning, and more. He broke free of Edo Tensei, was truly resurrected via Rinne Rebirth, became the Ten-Tails jinchuriki, and activated the Infinite Tsukuyomi — only to be betrayed by Black Zetsu, who used his body to resurrect Kaguya. In his final moments, Madara reconciled with Hashirama and acknowledged that Hashirama's way was right.

key: โอบิโตะ อุจิฮะ
28.content: Obito Uchiha was a shinobi of Konohagakure's Uchiha clan, Kakashi's teammate under Minato's Team, and the primary antagonist for much of the series operating under the alias 'Tobi' and later claiming to be 'Madara Uchiha.' As a child, Obito was similar to Naruto — a cheerful underdog who dreamed of becoming Hokage and had a crush on his teammate Rin Nohara. During the Third Great War mission at Kannabi Bridge, he was crushed by a cave-in while saving Kakashi, giving Kakashi his left Sharingan eye as a parting gift. He was rescued by the real elderly Madara Uchiha, who repaired his body using Hashirama cells and White Zetsu matter. Madara intended Obito as his instrument. The plan worked when Obito witnessed Kakashi killing Rin (who had thrown herself onto Kakashi's Chidori to prevent the Three-Tails inside her from destroying Konoha). This broke Obito completely, causing him to massacre the Kiri-nin present and embrace Madara's nihilistic worldview that the real world was hell. Obito's Mangekyo Sharingan ability is Kamui — the right eye allows him to make his body intangible by sending parts of himself to the Kamui dimension, and to teleport himself and others to that dimension. (Kakashi's left eye warps targets at long range.) He orchestrated the Nine-Tails Attack on Konoha (extracting Kurama from Kushina and controlling it with his Sharingan), manipulated the Fourth Mizukage Yagura to create the Blood Mist, helped Itachi with the Uchiha Massacre, co-founded the new Akatsuki as its shadow leader, and started the Fourth Great Ninja War. As the Ten-Tails jinchuriki, he gained godlike power but was defeated by Naruto and Sasuke. Through Naruto's unwavering insistence that Obito was still the boy who wanted to be Hokage, Obito was redeemed. He turned against Madara, sacrificed himself to save Naruto's life (shielding him from Kaguya's attack), and temporarily gave Kakashi both his Mangekyo Sharingan from the afterlife for the final battle. Obito died as a hero, reuniting with Rin in the afterlife.

key: อิทาจิ อุจิฮะ
29.content: Itachi Uchiha was a prodigy of the Uchiha clan and one of the most complex characters in the series. Born during the Third Great War, he witnessed battlefield horrors as a young child, which made him a pacifist at heart. He graduated the Academy at 7, mastered the Sharingan at 8, became Chunin at 10, and joined ANBU at 11 — all unprecedented achievements. Itachi was caught between his clan's planned coup d'état against Konoha and his loyalty to the village. Unable to find a peaceful solution and faced with the certainty that civil war would lead to another Great War, the 13-year-old Itachi accepted the mission from Danzo and the elders to eliminate the Uchiha clan. He killed everyone — his parents, his lover Izumi (in some accounts, giving her a peaceful death via Tsukuyomi), and all others — except his beloved younger brother Sasuke. He made himself the villain, telling Sasuke to hate him and seek revenge, giving Sasuke a reason to live and grow strong. He then joined Akatsuki as a double agent, monitoring threats to Konoha from within. His Mangekyo Sharingan abilities are among the most powerful: Tsukuyomi (the most powerful genjutsu, trapping victims in a world where Itachi controls space, time, and matter — famously torturing Kakashi for 72 hours in an instant), Amaterasu (inextinguishable black flames that burn anything for seven days and nights), and Susanoo (armored with the Yata Mirror, which reflects all attacks, and the Totsuka Blade, a spiritual sword that seals anything it pierces in an eternal genjutsu dream). Itachi was also a master of standard genjutsu, shurikenjutsu, and Fire Style. He secretly suffered from a terminal illness throughout the story, taking medication to prolong his life just long enough to die by Sasuke's hand as planned. In their final battle, Itachi intentionally lost, poking Sasuke's forehead one last time before dying with a smile. Reanimated in the Fourth War, Itachi broke free of Edo Tensei control (using a pre-programmed Kotoamatsukami from Shisui's eye implanted in a crow he had given Naruto), teamed up with Sasuke to fight Kabuto, and used Izanami (a genjutsu that traps the target in an infinite loop until they accept their true self) to stop Kabuto and end the Edo Tensei. Before being released, Itachi told Sasuke the truth of his love: 'No matter what you decide to do from now on, I will love you forever.'

key: ไมโตะ ไกย์
30.content: Might Guy (Maito Gai) is a Jonin of Konohagakure, renowned as 'Konoha's Sublime Green Beast of Prey' and the greatest taijutsu master in shinobi history. The son of Might Duy, a Genin mocked as the 'Eternal Genin,' Guy inherited his father's philosophy: that hard work and dedication can overcome any natural talent. Duy spent twenty years mastering the Eight Inner Gates and sacrificed himself opening all eight to save Guy from the Seven Ninja Swordsmen — a moment that shaped Guy's life. The Eight Inner Gates (Hachimon Tonko) are eight chakra limiters in the body; opening them progressively unleashes enormous power at the cost of severe physical damage. Guy can open all Eight Gates: First (Opening), Second (Healing), Third (Life), Fourth (Pain), Fifth (Limit), Sixth (View), Seventh (Wonder), and Eighth — the Gate of Death, which grants power surpassing the Five Kage but kills the user. Guy's taijutsu arsenal without the gates is already formidable: Dynamic Entry, Strong Fist style, Leaf Hurricane, Morning Peacock (Seventh Gate — rapid punches that ignite from friction), Daytime Tiger (Seventh Gate — compressed air cannon), and Evening Elephant (Eighth Gate — sequential air-pressure attacks). His ultimate technique in the Eighth Gate is Night Guy — a single kick so fast it warps space-time itself. In the Fourth War, Guy opened the Eighth Gate against Six Paths Madara Uchiha (the Ten-Tails jinchuriki), who declared Guy the strongest fighter he had ever faced. Night Guy nearly killed Madara and bent the very fabric of space. Guy survived only because Naruto, empowered by Six Paths chakra, saved him with Yang seal healing — though Guy was left wheelchair-bound. His personality is defined by exuberant passion, the 'Power of Youth' philosophy, his self-imposed training challenges, and his self-declared eternal rivalry with Kakashi (50 wins, 49 losses). He is Rock Lee's beloved sensei and role model.

31.content: Rock Lee is a shinobi of Konohagakure and the most dedicated taijutsu specialist of his generation. Born with virtually no ability to mold chakra for ninjutsu or genjutsu — an almost insurmountable handicap for a ninja — Lee dedicated himself entirely to taijutsu under the mentorship of Might Guy. He adopted Guy's appearance (bowl cut, green jumpsuit, leg warmers hiding training weights), philosophy, and fighting style completely. Lee's defining moment came during the Chunin Exams, where he revealed his incredible speed by dropping his training weights (which cratered the floor) and fought Gaara of the Sand. He opened the Inner Gates up to the Fifth Gate, performing the Primary Lotus and Hidden Lotus techniques, and managed to penetrate Gaara's 'absolute defense' — something no one had done before. Despite his efforts, Gaara's sand crushed Lee's left arm and leg, and medical ninja said he might never fight again. Tsunade later performed surgery with a 50% survival rate, which Lee accepted without hesitation. Lee can open up to the Sixth Gate (Gate of View). His techniques include: Strong Fist style, Leaf Hurricane, Leaf Great Whirlwind, Primary Lotus (Front Lotus — requires at least the First Gate), Hidden Lotus (Reverse Lotus — requires higher gates), and Drunken Fist (Lee becomes unpredictable and dangerously powerful when accidentally consuming even a small amount of alcohol). During the Fourth War, Lee fought alongside Guy and proved himself a formidable force. In the Boruto era, Lee is a Jonin and father to Metal Lee, who inherited his father's dedication but also suffers from performance anxiety. Rock Lee embodies the series' theme that determination and effort can rival or surpass innate genius.

key: เนจิ เฮียวกะ
32.content: Neji Hyuga was a prodigy of the Hyuga clan's Branch House and one of the most talented shinobi of his generation. The Hyuga clan is divided into the Main House (which protects the Byakugan's secrets) and the Branch House (whose members are branded with the Caged Bird Seal — a cursed mark that can destroy their Byakugan at the Main House's command). Neji's father, Hizashi, was the twin brother of Main House head Hiashi. When Kumogakure demanded compensation after their attempted kidnapping of Hinata failed, Hizashi volunteered to die in Hiashi's place to protect the Byakugan — choosing his death rather than having it forced upon him. Young Neji, not understanding the full truth, believed his father was sacrificed by the Main House. This bred a deep fatalism: Neji believed destiny was fixed, that people are born into unchangeable roles, and that a 'failure' (like Naruto or Hinata) could never surpass a 'genius.' He mastered the Byakugan (360-degree vision, chakra point detection, 50m+ range), Gentle Fist (attacking the chakra pathway system directly), Eight Trigrams Sixty-Four Palms (sealing 64 chakra points in rapid succession), Eight Trigrams Palms Revolving Heaven/Rotation (a spinning chakra shield — a Main House technique he learned through observation alone), and later developed his own technique, Eight Trigrams: Vacuum Palm (long-range chakra burst). During the Chunin Exams, Neji brutally defeated Hinata but was defeated by Naruto, who proved that 'losers' can surpass 'geniuses' through determination — changing Neji's worldview forever. Neji became one of the first Konoha 11 to reach Jonin rank. He died during the Fourth Great Ninja War, shielding Naruto and Hinata from the Ten-Tails' attack with his own body. His final words told Naruto that his life was no longer the only one he carried. His death symbolized breaking free of the cage of destiny — dying by his own choice, protecting those he loved, as his father had.

key: ฮินาตะ เฮียวกะ
33.content: Hinata Hyuga is a kunoichi of Konohagakure, the former heiress of the Hyuga clan, and the wife of Naruto Uzumaki. Born as the eldest daughter of Hiashi Hyuga (head of the Main House), Hinata was expected to be a prodigious fighter, but her gentle and timid nature made her seem weak by Hyuga standards. Her father eventually deemed her unfit and shifted focus to her younger sister Hanabi. Hinata's defining trait is her admiration and love for Naruto, which began in childhood when she witnessed him being bullied but never giving up. She adopted his 'never give up' philosophy as her own ninja way (nindo). As a Byakugan user, Hinata practices the Gentle Fist fighting style. Her signature techniques include: Gentle Step: Twin Lion Fists (shaping chakra into lion heads around her fists for devastating strikes), Protection of the Eight Trigrams Sixty-Four Palms (a defensive technique creating a dome of sharp chakra needles), and standard Hyuga techniques like the Eight Trigrams Sixty-Four Palms. Her most iconic moment was standing against Pain to protect a defeated Naruto, confessing her love and fighting despite knowing she had no chance — her apparent death triggered Naruto's Six-Tails transformation. She survived and her feelings were later reciprocated. In 'The Last: Naruto the Movie,' Hinata plays a central role — she is revealed to be the Byakugan Princess connected to Hamura Otsutsuki's lineage, awakens Hamura's chakra, and destroys the Tenseigan with Naruto's help. She and Naruto marry and have two children: Boruto and Himawari (who has latent Byakugan). In the Boruto era, Hinata is a devoted mother. She is sealed away alongside Naruto by Kawaki in the altered timeline.

key: ชิคามารุ นาระ
34.content: Shikamaru Nara is a shinobi of Konohagakure's Nara clan and one of the most brilliant strategic minds in the ninja world, possessing an IQ over 200. Despite his genius, Shikamaru is legendarily lazy, considering most things 'troublesome' (mendokusai) and preferring to watch clouds. He was placed on Team 10 under Asuma Sarutobi alongside Ino Yamanaka and Choji Akimichi (the new generation of the Ino-Shika-Cho formation, a legendary trio formation spanning generations of their three clans). The Nara clan's signature technique is Shadow Possession Jutsu (Kagemane no Jutsu) — using shadows to connect with and control an opponent's movements. Advanced variations include: Shadow Strangle Jutsu (solidifying shadows to choke), Shadow Stitching (piercing with shadow tendrils), and Shadow Imitation Shuriken (imbuing weapons with shadow-binding properties). Shikamaru was notably the only Genin to be promoted to Chunin after the Konoha Crush exams — not because he won, but because of his strategic brilliance (he forfeited his match against Temari after winning strategically because he ran out of chakra). His most significant character arc involves the death of his sensei Asuma Sarutobi at the hands of the Akatsuki members Hidan and Kakuzu. Shikamaru's grief transformed him temporarily, and he devised a brilliant strategy to separate the immortal Hidan from Kakuzu, trap Hidan in a pit, and bury him alive using explosive tags and the Nara clan's forest — avenging Asuma while honoring his memory. He inherited Asuma's lighter and his 'Will of Fire' philosophy: the king that the shinobi protect is the next generation. In the Boruto era, Shikamaru serves as the Seventh Hokage's chief advisor and right-hand man, essentially running the village's strategic operations. He married Temari of Sunagakure, and their son is Shikadai. When Naruto is sealed away, Shikamaru takes on the role of acting leader.

key: กาอาระแห่งทราย
35.content: Gaara of the Sand Waterfall is a shinobi of Sunagakure, the Fifth Kazekage, and a former jinchuriki of Shukaku (the One-Tailed Beast). Gaara's birth killed his mother Karura, and his father the Fourth Kazekage Rasa sealed Shukaku within him to create a living weapon. The unstable seal caused Shukaku to influence Gaara, and his sand defense (a mother's love — Karura's will protecting him through the sand) was misinterpreted as the beast's power. His uncle Yashamaru, the only person who showed him love, was ordered by Rasa to assassinate Gaara as a test; when Yashamaru failed and revealed (falsely, as later revealed) that he had always hated Gaara, the child snapped. He carved the kanji for 'love' (ai, 愛) on his forehead, declared himself a being who loved only himself, and became a remorseless killer. His sand techniques include: Sand Shield (automatic defense), Sand Burial (encasing enemies in sand and crushing them), Sand Coffin, Desert Suspension (flight), Sand Tsunami, and his ultimate defense — the Shield of Shukaku. During the Chunin Exams, Gaara was terrifyingly powerful and unstable, partially transforming into Shukaku during the Konoha Crush. Naruto defeated him and, through their shared pain as jinchuriki, showed Gaara that bonds and love could give strength. This completely transformed Gaara. He became the Fifth Kazekage — loved and respected by his village. When Akatsuki (Deidara and Sasori) extracted Shukaku from him, Gaara died. Elder Chiyo of Sunagakure sacrificed her life to revive him, and the entire village celebrated his return. Even without Shukaku, Gaara retains his sand abilities. He served as commander of the Allied Shinobi Forces' Fourth Division and later as Regimental Commander during the Fourth War. In the Boruto era, he remains Kazekage and has an adopted son, Shinki (who uses Iron Sand).

key: คิลเลอร์บี
36.content: Killer Bee (Kirabi) is a shinobi of Kumogakure and the jinchuriki of Gyuki, the Eight-Tailed Beast (Hachibi) — an octopus-bull hybrid and the second most powerful Tailed Beast after Kurama. Bee is the adopted brother of the Fourth Raikage A, chosen as Gyuki's host after the previous jinchuriki lost control. Unlike most jinchuriki who struggled with their beasts, Bee achieved complete harmony with Gyuki through mutual respect and understanding, making him a 'Perfect Jinchuriki' — able to fully transform into the Eight-Tails and use Bijuu Bomb (Tailed Beast Bomb) at will. His fighting style is unique and eccentric: Bee wields seven swords simultaneously using unorthodox body positions (elbows, knees, mouth, underarms, neck), creating an unpredictable 'Disturbance Taijutsu' style. Combined with Lightning Style and his raw physical power, this makes him one of the most dangerous close-combat fighters alive. His signature techniques include: Lariat (a devastating clothesline attack charged with Lightning chakra, deadly in combination with the Raikage), Bijuu Bomb, Version 1 and 2 Tailed Beast cloaks, and full Eight-Tails transformation. Personality: Bee is an enthusiastic (and terrible) rapper, constantly freestyling in battle and daily life, much to everyone's annoyance (particularly his brother the Raikage and his partner Gyuki). Despite his comedic exterior, Bee is a deeply skilled and perceptive fighter. Sasuke's Team Taka fought Bee and nearly lost — Bee was one of the few opponents who decisively outclassed Sasuke. Bee trained Naruto to control Kurama's power at the Waterfall of Truth and the Island Turtle. During the Fourth War, Bee fought alongside Naruto against the reanimated jinchuriki and the Ten-Tails. Bee's bond with Gyuki is one of the purest jinchuriki relationships in the series, serving as the model for Naruto's eventual friendship with Kurama.

key: คาบุโตะ ยาคุชิ
37.content: Kabuto Yakushi is a former spy and medical ninja who served as Orochimaru's right-hand man and became one of the most dangerous antagonists in the Fourth Great Ninja War. As an orphan raised in a Konoha orphanage by the nun Nonou Yakushi, Kabuto was recruited by Danzo's ROOT at a young age and trained as a spy, adopting multiple identities across different nations. Danzo eventually manipulated Kabuto and Nonou into unknowingly targeting each other — when Kabuto killed Nonou without recognizing her (and she failed to recognize him due to ROOT's manipulation), his sense of identity shattered completely. Orochimaru found and recruited him, and Kabuto served as a mole within various organizations while assisting Orochimaru's experiments. A medical ninja of extraordinary skill (rivaling Shizune), Kabuto's abilities include the Chakra Scalpel (cutting through flesh and organs without external wounds), rapid self-healing, and intelligence gathering. After Orochimaru's death/absorption by Sasuke, Kabuto absorbed Orochimaru's remains and the DNA of numerous powerful shinobi (Suigetsu, Karin, Jugo, Sound Five, etc.) into his body, progressively transforming himself. He mastered Sage Mode at the Ryuchi Cave (the snake equivalent of Mount Myoboku), achieving Snake Sage Mode — white scales, horns, enhanced senses, and the ability to passively absorb nature energy through his modified body. His most devastating contribution was perfecting Edo Tensei (Impure World Reincarnation) beyond even Tobirama's level — he summoned an army of the dead including Madara Uchiha, previous Kage, Akatsuki members, and legendary warriors. He also modified the technique so he could enhance the reanimated beyond their living power levels. During the war, Itachi Uchiha (who had broken free of Edo Tensei) and Sasuke confronted Kabuto in the cave where he operated. Itachi trapped Kabuto in Izanami — a Sharingan genjutsu that forces the victim to relive the same moments infinitely until they accept their true self. This forced Kabuto to confront his identity crisis. He accepted himself as Kabuto Yakushi, undid the Edo Tensei, and was redeemed. In the Boruto era, Kabuto runs the orphanage where he grew up, wearing Nonou's glasses as a tribute, having found his true self at last.

key: ดันโซ ชิมูระ
38.content: Danzo Shimura was a Konoha elder, war hawk, and the founder and leader of ROOT — a covert ANBU subdivision that operated in the shadows, its members emotionally conditioned to feel nothing and obey without question. ROOT members had their tongues sealed with cursed marks to prevent them from revealing information about the organization. Danzo was a contemporary and rival of the Third Hokage Hiruzen Sarutobi — both were students of the Second Hokage Tobirama. While Hiruzen followed the Will of Fire (protecting the village through love), Danzo embodied a darker pragmatism: he believed Konoha's safety justified any action, no matter how immoral. His most notorious act was orchestrating the Uchiha Massacre — when diplomacy might have still worked, Danzo pushed for extermination, ordering Itachi to kill the clan while stealing Sharingan eyes from the dead for his own use. He had Shisui Uchiha's right eye stolen (gaining the Kotoamatsukami — the ultimate genjutsu that can subtly control anyone's thoughts without them knowing) and implanted multiple Sharingan into his right arm (concealed by bandages), along with Hashirama cells to sustain them. Using these Sharingan, Danzo could spam Izanagi — a forbidden technique that rewrites reality to undo fatal injuries (but blinds the eye used). Other crimes: allying with Hanzo to betray the original Akatsuki (causing Yahiko's death and Nagato's descent into Pain), blocking information from reaching the Third Hokage, attempting to control the Nine-Tails, and scheming to become Hokage. After Pain destroyed Konoha and the Third and Fifth Hokages were incapacitated, Danzo briefly became the Sixth Hokage Candidate and represented Konoha at the Five Kage Summit. There, he was exposed using Kotoamatsukami to manipulate Mifune's vote. Sasuke Uchiha confronted and killed Danzo outside the summit — Danzo burned through all his Sharingan/Izanagi and attempted a final suicide seal to take Sasuke with him but failed. In death, Danzo's final thoughts were of Hiruzen, wishing he could have been like his rival.

key: โคโนฮามารุ
โคโนฮามารุ ซารุโทบิ
39.content: Konohamaru Sarutobi is a Jonin of Konohagakure and the grandson of the Third Hokage Hiruzen Sarutobi. As a child, Konohamaru was frustrated that everyone saw him only as 'the Hokage's grandson' rather than as his own person. When he met Naruto — the only person who treated him as an individual rather than through his grandfather's legacy — Konohamaru declared Naruto his rival and boss. He became Naruto's self-proclaimed student, learning the Sexy Jutsu, Shadow Clone Jutsu, and eventually the Rasengan (which he used to defeat one of Pain's Six Paths during the Assault on Konoha — a defining moment that showed his growth). Konohamaru is a member of the Sarutobi clan, specializing in Fire Style jutsu (particularly Fire Style: Burning Ash), as well as the Rasengan and its variations. He also has a summoning contract with toads (following Naruto's lineage of toad summoners). In the Boruto era, Konohamaru has become a respected Jonin and serves as the sensei of the new Team 7 — consisting of Boruto Uzumaki, Sarada Uchiha, and Mitsuki. His dream of becoming Hokage persists, though he acknowledges he has a long way to go. As a sensei, he cares deeply for his students and has faced serious threats alongside them, including encounters with Kara members. His personality blends Naruto's enthusiasm and determination with a growing maturity and sense of responsibility befitting a team leader and the Sarutobi legacy.

40.content: Ino Yamanaka — Mind Transfer jutsu, sensory ninja, Team 10, flower shop. Becomes head of Konoha's sensory division in Boruto era. Married Sai.

41.content: Choji Akimichi — Expansion jutsu, Butterfly Mode, Team 10, loyal friend. Overcame self-doubt to become powerful warrior. Akimichi clan heir.

42.content: Kiba Inuzuka — Fang Over Fang, partner Akamaru, tracking specialist, Team 8. Brash and competitive. Inuzuka clan uses ninja dogs.

43.content: Shino Aburame — Insect user, parasitic destruction insects that feed on chakra, Team 8. Quiet, logical, dependable. Becomes Academy teacher in Boruto era.

44.content: Tenten — Weapons specialist, summoning scrolls, admires Tsunade. Team Guy. Expert in bukijutsu (weapons techniques). Uses the Sage of Six Paths tools briefly in war.

45.content: Sai — ROOT operative assigned to Team 7, Super Beast Scroll (ink jutsu), initially emotionless due to ROOT conditioning. Gradually learned emotions through bonds with Naruto. Married Ino.

46.content: Yamato (Tenzo) — Wood Style user (from Orochimaru's experiments with Hashirama's cells), ANBU codename Tenzo, temporary Team 7 captain. Can suppress tailed beast chakra. Captured during war by Kabuto for Zetsu creation.

47.content: Kurenai Yuhi — Team 8 sensei, genjutsu specialist. Asuma's lover, pregnant with his child when he died. Raised Mirai Sarutobi.

key: อาสึมะ ซารุโทบิ
48.content: Asuma Sarutobi — Team 10 sensei, Third Hokage's son, wind chakra blade user, former Guardian Ninja Twelve. Killed by Hidan of Akatsuki. His death deeply affected Shikamaru, Ino, and Choji.

49.content: Temari — Gaara's older sister, wind style with giant fan, strategic fighter. Married Shikamaru, mother of Shikadai.

50.content: Kankuro — Gaara's older brother, puppet master (Crow, Black Ant, Salamander). Became Suna's top puppeteer. Supports Gaara as Kazekage.

51.content: Chiyo — Suna elder, legendary puppeteer (Ten Puppets of Chikamatsu), created Sasori's first puppets (his parents). Sacrificed her life to resurrect Gaara after Akatsuki extracted Shukaku. Antidote expert.

key: นากาโตะ อุซึมากิ
52.content: Pain (Nagato Uzumaki) — Uzumaki orphan from Amegakure, given Madara's Rinnegan. Led Akatsuki after Yahiko's death using Six Paths of Pain (corpse puppets). Almighty Push destroyed Konoha. Convinced by Naruto, used Rinne Rebirth to revive all killed in invasion — died from exhaustion.

53.content: Konan — Paper jutsu user, Akatsuki co-founder with Nagato and Yahiko. Angel of Amegakure. After Nagato's death, tried to kill Obito with 600 billion paper bombs. Obito used Izanagi to survive and killed her.

54.content: Yahiko — Original leader of Akatsuki (peace organization), charismatic visionary. Killed by Hanzo's trap (forced Nagato to choose). His death transformed Akatsuki from peace seekers to terrorists. Became Deva Path.

key: คิซาเมะ โฮชิกากิ
55.content: Kisame Hoshigaki — Monster of the Mist, wielded Samehada (chakra-eating sword), massive chakra reserves rivaling a tailed beast. Paired with Itachi in Akatsuki. Committed suicide rather than reveal intel. Water style master.

56.content: Deidara — Iwagakure missing-nin, explosion style (mouths on hands), art is explosion philosophy. Akatsuki member, killed Gaara (extracted Shukaku). Fought Sasuke and self-destructed (C0). Paired with Sasori then Tobi.

key: ซาโซริแห่งทรายแดง
57.content: Sasori (Sasori of the Red Sand) — Suna missing-nin, turned himself into a human puppet. Hiruko armor, Third Kazekage puppet, 100 puppet army. Akatsuki member. Killed by Sakura and Chiyo — let himself die. Created poisons, Kankuro inherited his puppets.

58.content: Hidan — Immortal Akatsuki member, Jashin religion, curse ritual (draws blood, enters circle, links damage to target). Killed Asuma. Shikamaru defeated him by burying him alive in Nara forest. Still alive but incapacitated.

59.content: Kakuzu — Ancient bounty hunter, five hearts (Earth Grudge Fear — steals hearts to extend lifespan and use multiple elements). Paired with Hidan. Killed by Naruto's Wind Release: Rasenshuriken (first use).

60.content: Zetsu — Black Zetsu: Kaguya's will given form, manipulated shinobi history for millennia (including Indra, Madara, etc.) to engineer her revival. White Zetsu: clones created from humans trapped in Infinite Tsukuyomi, used as Akatsuki's spy network and 4th war army.

61.content: Akatsuki — S-rank missing-nin organization. Originally founded by Yahiko, Nagato, Konan for peace. Corrupted by Obito/Madara's influence into tailed beast hunting group. Black cloaks with red clouds. Ten members in pairs. True purpose: gather all bijuu for Infinite Tsukuyomi plan.

key: อันบุแบล็คออปส์
62.content: ANBU Black Ops — Elite covert force in each village. Animal masks, tattoo on shoulder. Assassination, espionage, protection. Notable ANBU: Kakashi, Itachi, Yamato, Sai. In Konoha, ROOT was Danzo's unsanctioned ANBU division.

63.content: ROOT Foundation — Danzo's secret ANBU subdivision. Operatives had emotions erased through conditioning. Cursed seal on tongue prevented speaking of ROOT. Members: Sai, Shin, Torune, Fu. Disbanded after Danzo's death.

Haku: Ice Style kekkei genkai, Demonic Mirroring Ice Crystals, devoted to Zabuza as his "tool." Both died on the Great Naruto Bridge mission — Naruto's first real lesson about the ninja world.

Sealed by her sons, revived in 4th war through Madara/Zetsu, sealed again by Team 7 with Six Paths power.

67.content: Momoshiki Otsutsuki — Otsutsuki who attacked during Chunin Exams (Boruto era), absorbed jutsu and returned them amplified. Defeated by Boruto's Vanishing Rasengan and giant Rasengan. Implanted Karma on Boruto before death — exists as Boruto's inner Otsutsuki.

68.content: Isshiki Otsutsuki / Jigen — Kaguya's partner who she betrayed. Survived by parasitizing monk Jigen. Sukunahikona (shrinking), Daikokuten (storage dimension). Led Kara. Wanted Kawaki as vessel. Fought Naruto (Baryon Mode) and Sasuke. Died when vessel expired.

69.content: Kara — Boruto-era villainous organization led by Jigen/Isshiki. INNERS: Jigen, Koji Kashin, Delta, Boro, Code, Amado, Eida, Daemon. OUTERS: agents embedded in society. Goal: cultivate Divine Tree, find Otsutsuki vessel. Scientific ninja tool enhanced members.

70.content: Boruto Uzumaki — Naruto & Hinata's son. Prodigy (unlike his father), three chakra natures, Jougan, Karma seal from Momoshiki. Resents father's absence as Hokage but comes to understand his path. After timeskip (Two Blue Vortex), branded a traitor, works in shadows. Vanishing Rasengan, Rasengan Uzuhiko.

71.content: Sarada Uchiha — Sasuke & Sakura's daughter, dreams of becoming Hokage. Sharingan awakened, Chidori, superhuman strength (from Sakura's training), highly intelligent. Team 7 (Boruto era) with Boruto and Mitsuki.

72.content: Mitsuki — Orochimaru's synthetic son (artificial human), Sage Transformation, wind/lightning style. Regards Boruto as his "sun." Calm, curious, powerful. Can enter snake Sage Mode.

73.content: Kawaki — Adopted son of Naruto, former vessel of Isshiki, Karma seal. Raised in abuse by Jigen. Devoted to Naruto to an extreme — in Two Blue Vortex, sent Naruto/Hinata to a sealed dimension to "protect" them, branded Boruto a traitor, and rules alongside Shikamaru.

74.content: Code — Kara Inner, fanatic follower of Isshiki, white Karma (failed vessel — gained power but no Otsutsuki data). Claw Marks (dimensional portals). After Isshiki's death, seeks to cultivate Divine Tree and destroy those who killed his god. Limiter removed by Amado.

75.content: Amado — Kara's genius scientist, created most of Kara's cyborg technology. Defected to Konoha, feeds intel but has hidden agendas. Created Eida and Daemon. Motivated by desire to resurrect his daughter. Manipulative, brilliant.

76.content: Eida (Ada) — Amado's cyborg creation, Senrigan (all-seeing eye covering past and present). Omnipotent charm ability — everyone who meets her falls in love (except Otsutsuki and blood relatives). Desires genuine love. Allied with Code initially, then Konoha.

77.content: Daemon — Eida's brother, Amado's cyborg, ability to reflect any attack/killing intent back at attacker. Childlike appearance and behavior but absurdly powerful. Protective of Eida.

Planned coup due to discrimination after Nine-Tails attack (blamed). Massacred by Itachi. Survivors: Sasuke, Obito (secretly), Sarada (next gen).

Shisui: Kotoamatsukami. All unlock Susanoo. Overuse causes blindness — progressively set eye_warning, then eye state to "blind" in status. Only EMS cures this. 98.content: Hyuga clan dojutsu. Near-360° vision (one blind spot), sees through objects, sees chakra system including all 361 tenketsu. Enables Gentle Fist style. Range varies by user (Neji exceeded 800m, Hinata's range even larger). Cannot copy jutsu like Sharingan but provides superior awareness.

99.content: Legendary dojutsu of the Sage of Six Paths. Six Paths abilities: Deva (gravity — Shinra Tensei, Chibaku Tensei), Human (soul extraction), Asura (mechanized limbs/weaponry), Animal (summoning), Preta (chakra absorption), Naraka (King of Hell — interrogation/repair). Also: Outer Path (life/death, chains, Gedo Statue). Grants all five nature transformations. Limbo clones (Madara's unique ability). Sasuke's tomoe Rinnegan allows space-time swap (Amenotejikara).
